THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FAILED TO FILE AN OPPOSITION, AND NOTICE OF HEARING BY THE FILING DEADLINE, AND THE SHERIFF GRANTED THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. PLAINTIFF MAY RE-FILE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney Brandon Tang present specially appearing for Plaintiff Unifund CCR Partners, A New York Partnership.
Defendant Hector Rodriguez present in pro per.

Court determines that there was no timely notice by Plaintiff, that Plaintiff intended to contest the court's tentative ruling. Per court's tentative ruling, PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS' Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is ordered OFF CALENDAR. The judgment creditor failed to file an opposition, and notice of hearing by the filing deadline, and the Sheriff granted the judgment debtor's claim of exemption. Plaintiff may re-file. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: S. Kane; Not reported.

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - HECTOR RODRIGUEZ, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS' Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is granted in part. Wage to be garnished in the amount of $20.00 per pay period. Order signed in open court. A copy of the order was handed to Mr. Rodriguez in court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Continued To Feb-26-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: HECTOR RODRIGUEZ, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court VACATED its tentative ruling AND CONTINUED HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION TO FEBRUARY 26, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. A HEARING WILL BE REQUIRED. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
